data.title: Lemon Seed Marketing earns multiple American Advertising Awards
data.description: A branding agency based in Lufkin, Texas, Lemon Seed Marketing, known for its expertise in strategy, storytelling, and visual identity, has been recognized for its achievements. The agency specializes in serving the home service industry and has recently won several prestigious American awards. This acknowledgment underscores Lemon Seed Marketing's leadership in the sector and highlights their successful branding and marketing efforts. The awards reflect the agency's commitment to excellence, innovation, and delivering impactful branding solutions.

data.title: Why Are Strategy Shares Surging On Friday?
data.description: Shares of Strategy Inc. (NASDAQ: MSTR) are seeing an increase in the Friday premarket session due to a rise in Bitcoin's (CRYPTO: BTC) prices. Bitcoin went up by 3.22% in the last 24 hours to reach $72,180.87. Nasdaq futures are up by 0.18% and S&P 500 futures have also seen a gain of 0.21%. Investor sentiment received a significant boost after Strategy's recent acquisition of Bitcoin worth $1.28 billion. With this purchase, the company bought 17,994 BTC at an average price of $70,946, marking 11 consecutive weeks of accumulation. Currently, Strategy Inc. holds Bitcoin valued at $52.65 billion, surpassing its market valuation of $47 billion. Executive Chairman Michael Saylor shared his remarks on the price movement on Thursday evening. For the full story, refer to the article available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Joby Completes Piloted Electric Air Taxi Flight Across San Francisco Bay and Around the Golden Gate
data.description: In San Francisco, Joby Aviation, Inc. (NYSE: JOBY) concluded a series of demonstration flights in the Bay Area to exhibit its electric air taxis for commercial passenger use. With a prominent skyline serving as a backdrop, the company highlighted its preparedness in an area known for heavy traffic. The flights showcased the future potential of noiseless and eco-friendly air travel. This milestone indicates that the transition to sustainable flight solutions is not just theoretical but rapidly approaching.

data.title: Douglas Elliman Inc. Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: In Miami, Douglas Elliman Inc. (NYSE:DOUG) released its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year 2025. CEO Michael S. Liebowitz expressed satisfaction with the company's performance during this period. The results indicate a positive start to their strategic realignment and commitment to strong financial practices. The solid results for the fourth quarter and full year reflect the company’s dedication to disciplined financial management.

data.title: Dollar Tree Earnings Are Imminent; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
data.description: Dollar Tree, Inc. (NASDAQ: DLTR) is set to announce its fourth-quarter earnings on March 16. Analysts predict quarterly earnings at $2.53 per share, an increase from $2.29 per share the previous year. The estimated revenue for the quarter is $5.47 billion, down from $8.27 billion a year ago. Daniel Delrosario was appointed as Senior Vice President of Investor Relations and Treasurer on Jan. 13. The stock closed at $111.70, dropping 1.4% on Thursday. For more analyst ratings and information, visit Benzinga's Analyst Stock Ratings page.

data.title: North American Helium Comments on Recent Supply Disruptions from Qatar and the Need for Diversified, Secure Helium Sources
data.description: North American Helium, based in Calgary, Alberta, has addressed recent disruptions in helium supply from Qatar. The company emphasized the importance of having diversified and secure sources of helium. Qatar is a major global supplier of helium, providing approximately 30% of the world's helium supply. North American Helium stressed the need for countries to secure alternative helium sources to prevent disruptions in critical industries that depend on this essential gas.

data.title: Acurx Pharmaceuticals, Inc. Reports Full Year and Fourth Quarter Results and Provides Business Update
data.description: On March 13, 2026, in Staten Island, Acurx Pharmaceuticals, Inc. revealed key financial information. Acurx, listed as ACXP on NASDAQ, is advancing a unique antibiotic class for challenging bacterial infections. The late-stage biopharmaceutical Company shared pivotal financial data today, suggesting significant progress in their pursuit.

data.title: United Natural Foods to Participate at the 38th Annual Roth Conference
data.description: United Natural Foods, Inc. (NYSE: UNFI) is set to join the 38th Annual Roth Conference, with President and Chief Financial Officer, Matteo Tarditi, partaking in a fireside chat on March 23, 2026, at 2:00 pm Eastern Time. The live audio webcast can be accessed through a link on the investor relations section of the Company’s website, www.unfi.com. United Natural Foods, Inc., known as UNFI, is a leading grocery wholesale company in North America.

data.title: NIQ Launches Beta of New AI-Powered Analytical Capabilities in Ask Arthur
data.description: The global consumer intelligence leader, NIQ (NYSE: NIQ), has introduced new AI-driven analytical features in beta on the NIQ Discover platform. These enhanced capabilities, available through Ask Arthur, offer users a comprehensive analysis process, aiding in data prioritization, trend comprehension, and transforming insights into actionable narratives with suggested next steps. As data complexity rises, organizations can benefit from this end-to-end analytical guidance.

data.title: Perfect Corp. Announces Filing of Annual Report on Form 20-F for Fiscal Year 2025
data.description: In New York, Perfect Corp. (NYSE: PERF) disclosed the submission of its annual report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2025. Perfect, a prominent provider of augmented reality (AR) and artificial intelligence (AI) Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) solutions for beauty and fashion industries, shared this update. The annual report is available for viewing in the SEC Filing section on Perfect Corp.'s investor relations website at https://ir.perfectcorp.com.

data.title: Ripley PR CEO Heather Ripley chosen as a Women We Admire honoree
data.description: Heather Ripley, the founder and CEO of Ripley PR, a global public relations agency specializing in home service and skilled industries, has been honored with an award that acknowledges female leaders making significant strides in innovation and influence. The recognition was given in Knoxville, Tennessee on March 13, 2026. This distinction highlights Ripley's leadership in driving change and impact across diverse sectors. This news showcases the dedication and expertise of women leaders impacting different industries.
